Document:
# All Materials
[textlink="View Full Wiki Page" link="https://ss14.misfitsystems.net/wiki/index.php/Crafting"]
This is a list of all available materials in the Wasteland.
## Natural and Animal Products
Water is a valuable resource. You will often find dirty or irradiated water in the Wasteland, which needs to be cleaned and disinfected to get clean drinking water.
[bold]Clean Water[/bold] — purified, safe to drink
[bold]Dirty Water[/bold] — contaminated, causes illness if consumed raw
[bold]Irradiated Water[/bold] — contains radiation, avoid unless desperate
Radscorpion tails can be harvested from radscorpions with a knife and used to produce antidote.
[bold]Radscorpion Tail[/bold] — antidote ingredient, harvested with a knife
Brahmin hide, hides, and chitin are harvested from the respective animals.
[bold]Brahmin Hide[/bold] — leather crafting material
For all other drinks and drink-related products, see the "Bartending" page.
## Ores, Metals, and Derivatives
Mine lead ore and process it in a forge to get lead ingots.
[bold]Lead Ore[/bold] — mined from ore veins
[bold]Lead Ingot[/bold] — processed from ore at a forge
Break down items to get some survival resources from them.
[bold]Wrecked Sportscar[/bold] — salvageable for scrap
[bold]Scrap Lead[/bold] — recovered from salvage
[bold]Scrap Steel[/bold] — recovered from salvage
[bold]Rusted Computer Terminal[/bold] — salvageable for electronics
[bold]Junk TV[/bold] — salvageable for electronics
[bold]Scrap Copper[/bold] — recovered from electronics
[bold]Scrap Electronic[/bold] — recovered from electronics
Mine sulfur ore and process it in a forge to get sulfur powder.
[bold]Sulfur Ore[/bold] — mined from ore veins
[bold]Sulfur Powder[/bold] — processed from ore at a forge
Gather fertilizer from rocks and grind it to get fertilizer as a reagent.
[bold]Fertilizer[/bold] — ground from rocks; used in farming and gunpowder recipes
If you need compost immediately, you can also slurry dung with water to make rotten compost for soil and farming recipes.
[bold]Rotten Compost[/bold] — made from dung and water; used for soil beds
Combine fertilizer, sulfur powder, and carbon (from coal) to make gunpowder.
[bold]Gunpowder[/bold] — crafted from fertilizer, sulfur powder, and carbon
## Wood and Wood Products
Wooden planks can be made from wooden logs harvested from trees. Then they can be used to make paper, and paper to make cardboard.
[bold]Wood Plank[/bold] — processed from logs; base for paper and cardboard
## Other Materials
Plastic can be obtained by melting down pre-war plastic scrap with a welding tool, by a chemical reaction, or with a recycler if you can find one.
[bold]Sheet Plastic[/bold] — melted from scrap or produced chemically
## Pre-War Products
Mr. Handy fuel can be found while exploring the Wasteland, and it is a handy fuel source for welding tools and generators.
[bold]Mr. Handy Fuel Tank[/bold] — fuel for welding tools and generators
